runbooks.label: Morning Review
runbooks.description: Review the daily briefing, scheduled-job posture, unified stream, and current governor status before widening automation for the day.

runbooks.label: Pause or Resume Automation
runbooks.description: Pause a lane or resume it through the governor when you need to halt background automation without touching SSH or Docker directly.

runbooks.label: Provider Exhaustion Recovery
runbooks.description: Inspect quota pressure, reserve posture, and provider fallback state; then prefer local execution or handoff-only modes when premium lanes are constrained.

runbooks.label: Provider Evidence Capture
runbooks.description: Use the automated Vault LiteLLM probe or explicit CLI evidence paths to convert weak provider lanes into concrete observed, auth-failed, or unsupported states.

runbooks.label: Gateway Onboarding Verification
runbooks.description: Verify the canonical LiteLLM env contract, generated adapter profiles, and gateway smoke-test path before treating devstack onboarding notes as current operator guidance.

runbooks.label: VAULT LiteLLM Provider Auth Repair
runbooks.description: Use the live provider probe, secret-surface report, and VAULT runtime checks to restore missing upstream provider env delivery for auth-failed LiteLLM API lanes.

runbooks.label: Local Runtime Env Bootstrap
runbooks.description: Verify DESK-local runtime env delivery for Redis-backed script lanes and keep the secret-bearing env file out of tracked source.

runbooks.label: DEV Secret-Delivery Normalization
runbooks.description: Audit DEV cron and systemd credential delivery read-only first, then normalize runtime.env and envfile-backed surfaces during an intentional maintenance pass.

runbooks.label: Governor Facade Rollback and Audit
runbooks.description: Use the runtime migration report, cutover packet, and retirement runbook to audit the completed DEV cutover and preserve rollback evidence for the retired :8760 surface.

runbooks.label: Autonomy Operations
runbooks.description: Use the autonomy activation report, governor posture, and provider evidence to operate the live full-system autonomy phase while keeping runtime mutations approval-gated and sovereign-only routing rules intact.

runbooks.label: Constrained Mode
runbooks.description: Pause experiments and optional loops when attention, approval, or compute pressure exceeds the bounded operating budget.

runbooks.label: Degraded Mode
runbooks.description: Suppress nonessential dispatch, launches, and promotions while core dependencies or active blockers are unhealthy.

runbooks.label: Recovery-Only Mode
runbooks.description: Stop all non-recovery dispatch and restore only auth, storage, and reconciliation surfaces until core control is trustworthy again.

runbooks.label: Blocked Approval
runbooks.description: Handle approval-gated work that cannot proceed yet by recording the blocker, keeping evidence in the operator inbox, and allowing unrelated ready work to continue.

runbooks.label: Postgres Restore
runbooks.description: Restore the Athanor durable ledger into a staged target, verify integrity, and only then repoint runtime surfaces.

runbooks.label: Redis Reconciliation
runbooks.description: Rebuild Redis hot state from durable Postgres truth after restart, failover, or drift without treating Redis as canonical state.

runbooks.label: Failed Promotion
runbooks.description: Abort a failed candidate promotion, execute the recorded rollback target, and verify smoke evidence before reopening the channel.

runbooks.label: Stuck Queue Recovery
runbooks.description: Use governor posture, scheduled-job state, and execution-run lineage to identify paused, deferred, or blocked work and restore forward progress safely.

runbooks.label: Stuck Media Pipeline
runbooks.description: Work the Sonarr/Radarr/Prowlarr/SABnzbd/Plex/Tautulli chain from queue health to rollback-safe remediation without mutating config casually.

runbooks.label: Source Auth Expiry
runbooks.description: Pause a governed source, refresh its auth surface, and only resume crawl or acquisition work after revalidation.

runbooks.label: Model Lane Outage
runbooks.description: Handle degraded local or cloud model lanes by preserving policy boundaries, rerouting safely, and recording the outage evidence.

runbooks.label: Watchdog Runtime Guard
runbooks.description: Operate the live watchdog canary, use bounded operator-envelope restart proof first, and keep protected-service and scope-widening decisions explicitly approval-gated.

runbooks.label: Operator Auth Failure
runbooks.description: Recover operator ingress when WebAuthn, session, or break-glass posture fails without widening broader runtime mutation scope.

runbooks.label: Sovereign Routing Verification
runbooks.description: Confirm refusal-sensitive or private work stayed on sovereign local lanes and that cloud-safe work remained eligible for frontier supervision.

runbooks.label: Restore Drill
runbooks.description: Verify the ordered recovery posture for Redis, Qdrant, Neo4j, and dashboard/agent deployment state using the governed non-destructive restore rehearsal.

runbooks.label: Incident Review
runbooks.description: Use the operator stream, synthetic operator tests, and release-ladder posture to understand failures, retries, fallback behavior, and recovery decisions.
